overview: A playful 3D interactive app where you spin, click, and explore torus shapes textured as glazed Polish donuts (pączki).
features: Full-viewport 3D torus gallery with donut glazing textures and lighting
5-8 colorful pączki (pink glaze, chocolate, cream, jam, sugar) in a floating cluster
Drag to orbit camera, scroll to zoom, click to make each donut bounce
Mobile touch support with drag and pinch gestures
Floating HUD with title and disappearing instruction hint
Reset button to return all donuts and camera to resting state
